data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of tracking cancellation and no-show rates. While the evidence provided mentions a no-show rate of 8% and a reduction from 15% after SMS reminders, it does not provide sufficient detail on how these rates are calculated or tracked over time, nor does it address cancellations specifically. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to fully satisfy the requirement for comprehensive tracking of cancellation and no-show rates.
gaps: Lack of detailed evidence on how cancellation rates are tracked and the methodology behind the no-show rate calculation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add detailed evidence for cancellation and no-show rate tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete metrics and data sources that verify cancellation and no-show rates.
